leadText: If you were looking for the currency in Pokémon GO, see Stardust (GO). Stardust (Japanese: ほしのすな Star Sand) is a valuable item introduced in Generation II.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Outside of Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Stardust serves no practical purpose other than to be sold. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Stardust is one of the crafting materials for Star Pieces .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Pretty, red sand. Sell high. R S E Colo XD Beautiful red sand. Can be sold at a high price. FR LG A pretty red sand with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 Lovely, red-colored sand with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price to shops. X Y OR AS Lovely, red sand that flows between the fingers with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price to shops. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V Lovely red sand that flows between the fingers with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a low price to shops. LA Lovely red sand that flows between the fingers with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a low price to the general store.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution 1.4.1.1 As a held item In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price G S C HG SS $ 900 $ 1000 R S E FR LG D P Pt W B2 W2 X Y OR AS BD SP LA N/A $ 1,000 B $ 10000 $ 1000 S M US UM P E Sw Sh S V N/A $ 1,500 In the Generation V games, the Stardust can be sold to the ore maniac inside the Icirrus City Pokémon Center for $ 2000. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , the Stardust can be sold to the valuable item buyer in Stow-on-Side for $ 4,000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Outside of Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Stardust serves no practical purpose other than to be sold. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Stardust is one of the crafting materials for Star Pieces . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Pretty, red sand. Sell high. R S E Colo XD Beautiful red sand. Can be sold at a high price. FR LG A pretty red sand with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 Lovely, red-colored sand with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price to shops. X Y OR AS Lovely, red sand that flows between the fingers with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price to shops. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V Lovely red sand that flows between the fingers with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a low price to shops. LA Lovely red sand that flows between the fingers with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a low price to the general store.
